steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Docker Compose(PostgreSQL 16) + Spring Boot 3.5(JPA/Validation/Lombok) + Next.js(App Router/TS/Tailwind) + CORS + GlobalExceptionHandler(7개 예외) + GeminiClient(재시도 3회/MockWebServer 테스트) + StudyRecord/ReviewItem Entity·Repository·Service 구현 완료

steps.name: word-crud
steps.summary: Word Entity(CRUD+soft delete)+WordRepository(검색/필터/정렬)+WordService(AI보강+학습기록+복습아이템 연동)+WordController(6개 엔드포인트)+DTO 5개+WordServiceTest(14개)+WordControllerTest(7개)+프론트엔드 단어 목록/상세/등록(Cozy Cafe 테마)+BottomNav 공통 컴포넌트 구현 완료
